3119680.name: Ooga Booga: Troubles in Time Soundtrack
3119680.description: The official soundtrack of the game Ooga Booga: Troubles in Time, composed by Jorge MS Music, offers a unique musical experience that accompanies players on their journey through time. With 20 original tracks that capture the essence of the game, this soundtrack combines tribal rhythms, epic melodies, and ambient sounds that will immerse you in the world of Ooga Booga. Ideal for both game fans and video game music enthusiasts.
